prestazioni: Engine swap to a Porsche 911 3.2L Type 930/20 flat-six (engine code: 930/20) with Mahle forged pistons (87.5mm bore), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a custom Schrick 284° camshaft for high-lift, long-duration performance. Compression ratio increased to 11.5:1 with custom JE piston domes and a ported/polished 911SC cylinder head featuring oversized 46mm intake and 40mm exhaust valves with titanium retainers from Supertech Performance.

Custom-built ITB (Individual Throttle Body) system using Jenvey 45mm throttle bodies (part #DCOE45) with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold, paired with a custom 4-into-1 stainless steel exhaust header (3.5" primary tubes) fabricated by Burns Stainless, terminating in a straight-pipe exhaust with a MagnaFlow 2.5" stainless steel muffler (part #14815) for aggressive sound without drone.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: RSR-style 915/16 transmission with a Guard Industries limited-slip differential (part #915-010-011-00), uprated CV joints from CVJ Driveshafts (part #CVJ-915), and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (part #3000950001) with a lightweight aluminum flywheel (part #911-105-011-00) to handle the increased torque.
estetica: Custom hand-formed aluminum widebody kit by RWB (Rauh-Welt Begriff) designed specifically for the 356 Speedster, featuring riveted fender flares (1.5" wider front, 2" wider rear) with integrated air vents for brake cooling, paired with a custom front splitter and rear diffuser in carbon fiber from 911RSR Reproductions (part #356-SPD-001).

Full custom interior by Recaro with Apex Pro seats (part #2000.91.50) upholstered in vintage-style brown leather with red stitching, matching a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (part #0071204113) wrapped in Alcantara, and a full roll cage by Matter Fab (part #MF-356-SPD) with integrated harness bar for Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses (part #70120).

Bespoke exterior paint by BASF Glasurit in a custom-mixed "Outlaw Gold" (a deep metallic gold with a subtle pearl flake), with matte black accents on the hood, rear deck, and fender flares. Custom Hella 160 headlights with LED halos (part #H160-LED) and taillights from a 911 2.7 RS (part #911-631-103-00) for a retro-modern hybrid look.
